item.title: The Supreme Court Struck Down Trump’s Tariffs. Are Lower Prices on the Way?
item.description: The SCOTUS tariff decision will have wide-ranging effects on Americans' budgets, trade deals, inflation rates, possible refunds and markets.

item.title: How to Remove Negative Items From Your Credit Report
item.description: Negative marks on your credit report can hurt your credit score and affect your ability to qualify for loans. Here's how to fix them.

item.title: Most Common Gold Investing Fears
item.description: Precious metals are having a banner year. But for investors, these common fears might be holding them back from buying gold.

item.title: The $50 Vet Visit That’s Breaking This Pet Owner
item.description: Here's how often experts say to visit the vet, and what to do if you're having trouble affording those appointments.

item.title: Gold Prices Today: February 20, 2026
item.description: Today’s gold prices see the precious metal move up from yesterday. Here are today’s gold futures prices and a quick snapshot of where gold was yesterd...
